Mental math You can use binomial multiplication to multiply numbers without a calculator. Say you need to multiply $$13$$ times $$15 .$$ Think of $$13$$ as $$10 + 3$$ and $$15$$ as $$10 + 5 .$$ ⓐ Multiply $$( 10 + 3 ) ( 10 + 5 )$$ by the FOIL method. ⓑ Multiply $$13 \cdotp 15$$ without using a calculator. ⓒ Which way is easier for you? Why?

Mental math You can use binomial multiplication to multiply numbers without a calculator. Say you need to multiply $$18$$ times $$17 .$$ Think of $$18$$ as $$20 - 2$$ and $$17$$ as $$20 - 3 .$$ ⓐ Multiply $$( 20 - 2 ) ( 20 - 3 )$$ by the FOIL method. ⓑ Multiply $$18 \cdotp 17$$ without using a calculator. ⓒ Which way is easier for you? Why?
Which method do you prefer to use when multiplying two binomials-the Distributive Property, the FOIL method, or the Vertical Method? Why?
Which method do you prefer to use when multiplying a trinomial by a binomial-the Distributive Property or the Vertical Method? Why?
